## What & why

<!--
Heads up: this is a solo, all-rights-reserved art project and it isn't taking
feature PRs (see CONTRIBUTING.md). For a clear bug fix, open an issue first.
Describe what changed and why, and link the issue (e.g. Closes #12).
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] Discussed first in an issue (or it's a small, obvious bug fix)
- [ ] CI passes (typecheck, lint, format, unit tests, build, the Playwright smoke suite)
- [ ] Respects [`CLAUDE.md`](../CLAUDE.md): JS-off storefront stays crawlable,
      every destination is a real `<a href>`, the PS1/N64 look holds
- [ ] No copyrighted assets, marks, or copy — original parody only
- [ ] No creative content added or reused (music/words/art stay all-rights-reserved)
